name: session-export
description: Export an OpenAI Codex (or Claude Code) session to a single self-contained HTML file, including subagent transcripts.

interface.shortDescription: Export a Codex/Claude session to a self-contained HTML file.
interface.longDescription: session-export turns a Codex rollout (or Claude Code session) JSONL transcript into one offline, self-contained HTML file — messages, reasoning, tool calls and results, and subagent transcripts — with a secret-redaction pass. No network access is needed to view the result.
defaultPrompt: Export this Codex session to a self-contained HTML file.
Save this conversation as an offline HTML transcript.
